text:
, is a female Japanese manga artist, also known as Natsuo Imamura (used for Fire Candy) in general public and KyokenDINERz in the doujinshi circle.

Kengo Yonekura was a name primary used for the early hentai titles and yaoi doujinshi. Kengo started her cartooning career drawing yaoi doujinshi for women but then moved on to making comics for men as a professional cartoonist.

Kengo also did character designs for the visual novel Kana...Imouto (Kana... Little Sister) and Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project.
